name: Wirken: shell-driven outbound fetch
query: logs("@ddsource:wirken @wirken.kind:assistant_tool_calls @wirken.event.calls.name:exec (@argv_first:curl OR @argv_first:wget OR @argv_first:msiexec OR @argv_first:invoke-webrequest OR @argv_first:iwr OR @argv_first:bitsadmin OR @argv_first:certutil)").index("main").rollup("count").last("5m") > 0
message:
Wirken agent ran a shell command that fetches over HTTP(S).

Detection: shell_outbound_fetch (1)
Severity baseline: medium

Fields to pivot on: @wirken.session_id, @wirken.event.agent_id, @wirken.event.adapter_id, @wirken.event.sender_id, @wirken.event.calls.id, @argv_command.

The `argv_first` field is materialised by a Datadog log parsing pipeline that splits the first whitespace token of @wirken.event.calls.arguments. See datadog/README.md for the pipeline JSON.

@security-team
